title: Moar Advancements
description: Adds new advancements to the minecraft advancement tree
body:
**This mod require any version of Fabric API (Fabric) / Quilted Fabric API (Quilt)** **None for FML (Forge)**
This mod adds new advancements to the minecraft advancement tree and modifies some core advancement in the tree Example: ![Figure 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd2efbedfd4b4527263de2f92a3b76d3d64944f.png) You can grant the advancement using the normal Minecraft namespace or using ma(Moar Advancements) namespace ![Figure 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33c3b048b37b88c6dd17b282ede8ae31309b8a7.png)
**Why would you want this mod?** Lets say you found all of the trims, great now no one will ever care but you will feel achieved when you get the advancement (Trimaholic) but not just Trimaholic i added Moar(More) Advancements. **Will you update this mod?** Yes, if i wanna add more advancements or fix bugs. **How do i report bugs and suggest stuff?** Go on the issues page of the source code and click on new issue, select the template and write your heart away. **How to install it?** Easy as baking a cake Steps on non client: 1. Download the mod 2. Download Fabric 3. Download Fabric API 4. Press Win + R and search for "appdata" or "%appdata%" 5. Go to Roaming/.minecraft/mods 6. Place the .JAR Files in the mods folder 7. Run Minecraft Steps on clients: **(Most clients do the work for you)** 1. Open the client 2. Edit the instance 3. Click Download Mod 4. Download Fabric API and the mod 5. Launch Minecraft
